_comment: ADR-015 iter43 — per-cell hf2q/llama tok/s ratio floors. RE-CAPTURED on coherent baseline after iter40+iter42 prefill fixes. Each cell maps to scripts/bench-matrix.sh CELLS labels. Floor expressed as ratio = hf2q_tps / llama_tps; cell fails if measured ratio drops >1pp below floor (i.e. >0.01 absolute).
_recapture_reason: iter43 re-baseline: 4 of 6 cells re-measured against coherent decode (12/12 coherence_smoke PASS). Two dwq48 cells not in coherence_smoke fixture set; their floors retained from iter41 pending separate measurement.
_methodology: scripts/bench-matrix.sh at NGEN=256, prompt='Hello, my name is', N_TRIALS=3 cold-process per cell. hf2q autodefault chain_n + iter34 default-on dense-SDPA-on-TQ-KV. Floor = measured_ratio - 0.01 tolerance.

qwen3.6-35b-a3b-dwq46._note: MoE-35B-A3B × dwq46 (Q4 base / Q6 sensitive). iter43 measured 0.9404 (-5.96pp), the largest gap on coherent baseline. Floor 0.93 = measured 0.9404 - 0.01 tolerance. Iter44 candidate cell.

qwen3.6-35b-a3b-dwq48._note: MoE-35B-A3B × dwq48 (Q4 base / Q8 sensitive). NOT re-measured at iter43 (not in coherence_smoke fixture set). Floor inherited from iter41.

qwen3.6-35b-a3b-apex._note: MoE-35B-A3B × apex (Q8-ish baseline). iter43 measured 1.0629 (+6.29pp), hf2q LEADS llama. Floor 1.05 = measured 1.0629 - 0.01 tolerance.

qwen3.6-27b-dwq46._note: dense-27B × dwq46. iter43 measured 1.0341 (+3.41pp); BOTH hf2q AND llama at ~29 t/s on this fixture (NOT 100+ t/s as historically claimed pre-iter40 — root cause of absolute drop is iter44 territory). Ratio holds parity. Floor 1.02 = measured 1.0341 - 0.01 tolerance.

qwen3.6-27b-dwq48._note: dense-27B × dwq48. NOT re-measured at iter43 (not in coherence_smoke fixture set). Floor inherited from iter41.

gemma-26B-dwq._note: gemma-26B × dwq. iter43 measured 0.9629 (-3.71pp). iter34 default-on dense-SDPA-on-TQ-KV lever validated AMPLIFIED on coherent baseline (legacy=0.7073, default=0.9629; Δratio=+25.56pp vs claimed +11.97pp). Floor 0.95 = measured 0.9629 - 0.01 tolerance.

_tolerance_explanation: A cell fails if its measured ratio drops >1 percentage point (0.01 absolute) below its ratio_floor. Tolerance accommodates same-day thermal noise (~5% intra-trial spread on M5 Max single-process per project_m5max_residency_null_win_single_process) without admitting a real regression.

iter30_chain_n_autodefault.caveat: alt run had 1 outlier trial (12.5 t/s); robust subsample Δ ≈ +9.2%

iter37_auto_barrier.caveat: iter37/38 audit confirms zero production callsites use dispatch_tracked_*; lever is structurally inert. Measured drop attributed to thermal warming (Wave C run-3) + per-trial cold-cache variance (legacy run had 12.5 outlier; auto-barrier-on trials all 20-23 range).
